name: Bullet Hell / Danmaku Starter
description: Intense bullet pattern shooter with small hitbox player character. Features dual movement modes (focused for precision with reduced speed, unfocused for mobility). Generates hundreds of bullets using object pooling to maintain performance. Graze system rewards near misses. Includes bomb/clear mechanic, multi-phase bosses with unique patterns per phase, and power level system that increases with pickups and resets on death.

projectStructure.project.godot: Godot 4.x project with input mappings: move_up/down/left/right, shoot (hold), focus toggle, bomb, pause

scenes/.gameplay.tscn: Node2D root scene with background, player node, boss node, bullet spawner node, effects layer (CanvasLayer), UI layer (CanvasLayer)
scenes/.player.tscn: Area2D player character with CollisionShape2D (small circle ~8px radius), AnimatedSprite2D with idle/focused states, particle emitter for trail effect, hitbox visualization (debug)
scenes/.bullet.tscn: Area2D with CollisionShape2D, Sprite2D (small colored circle/sprite), velocity component. Pooled and reused, not freed
scenes/.bullet_spawner.tscn: Node2D with empty child nodes representing spawn points (offset positions around boss), Timer node for pattern timing
scenes/.boss.tscn: Area2D boss character with CollisionShape2D, AnimatedSprite2D (boss visual), health bar, phase indicator visual, HealthComponent autoload reference

items/.power_item.tscn: Area2D collectible with spinning sprite, +1 power pickup, particle effect on collection, sound effect
items/.point_item.tscn: Area2D collectible with small sprite, score bonus (10000 points), fade out animation
items/.bomb_item.tscn: Area2D collectible with bomb icon, +1 bomb count, sound effect
items/.extra_life.tscn: Area2D collectible with 1UP visual, +1 life, sound effect

effects/.graze_effect.tscn: Marker2D with particle emitter, brief spark effect at graze location, disappears after 0.3 seconds
effects/.explosion.tscn: Marker2D with large particle burst, plays 0.5 second explosion animation, scales based on source size

ui/.score_display.tscn: CanvasLayer with Label for score (formatted as text, supports large numbers), position top-center
ui/.power_gauge.tscn: CanvasLayer with TextureProgressBar showing power level 0-100%, icon representation, position top-right
ui/.lives_bombs.tscn: CanvasLayer with life count display (UI 1UP icons), bomb count display (bomb icons), position top-left

preBuiltMechanics: Small hitbox player: Area2D with 8-12px radius collision, visual representation larger than actual hitbox
Dual movement modes: unfocused (8-10 units/frame, fast, wide hitbox perception), focused (3-5 units/frame, slow, narrow hitbox with visual effect)
Continuous shooting: held shoot key auto-fires bullets from player center at regular interval (8 per second default)
Bullet pool system: pre-instantiate 1000+ bullet nodes in _ready(), reuse via set_visible() and position reset instead of instantiate/queue_free

Bullet pattern definitions: circle (bullets spawn in 360° circle expanding outward), spiral (rotating bullets with outward drift), aimed (bullets shoot at player position when fired), wave (alternating left-right patterns), random (probabilistic scattered fire)
Pattern sequencer: boss_phase.gd controls which patterns activate in sequence, timing delays between pattern changes
Graze system: track bullets within graze_range (~30px) of player without collision, increment graze counter, emit graze_effect particles, add bonus score (100 per graze)
Bomb mechanic: clear all bullets on screen, apply screen flash effect, play explosion sound, cost 1 bomb charge
Power level system: 0-100 integer scale, increases +1 per power_item pickup, soft cap at 100, resets to 0 on death, affects player shot pattern and damage output
Boss phase system: health thresholds trigger phase transitions (0-25%, 26-50%, 51-75%, 76-100%), each phase uses different pattern sequences
Collision detection: Area2D signals for bullet-player collision, instant game over on bullet hit (unless invincible frame active)
Score system: base damage from bullets, graze bonuses, pattern dodge bonuses, multiplier based on power level, formatted display for millions/billions
customizationPoints: Bullet patterns: add figure-8 patterns, heart-shaped patterns, spiral inward patterns, random aimed patterns with spread
Boss design: expand bullet count in later phases (phase 1: 3-5 bullets, phase 4: 20-50 bullets), add boss movement patterns during attack
Difficulty scaling: implement difficulty selector affecting pattern density, bullet speed, player health, bomb count
Visual effects: add screen shake on bomb detonation, slow-motion effect during perfect dodges, visual distortion on graze hits
Power system customization: implement power tiers granting visual changes (colored aura at 50+, particle trail at 75+), gameplay changes (wider spread, faster fire rate)
Extra lives mechanic: implement life system, lose 1 life per death (continue from last position), game over at 0 lives
Boss variety: create different boss sprite/sound styles, implement boss movement patterns during phases, add boss AI targeting logic
Scoring system: implement combo multiplier for consecutive hits without damage, implement score milestones for extra lives at 1M, 2M, etc.
Audio design: add unique sound effect per pattern type, boss phase transition music stings, triumphant completion music
examplePrompts: Implement a spiral bullet pattern that fires 12 bullets in a rotating circle, increasing angle by 30 degrees every 0.15 seconds for 8 rotations total
Create a graze system that detects bullets within 30 pixels of the player without colliding, plays a spark effect, and awards 100 bonus points per graze

Design a boss with 4 phases: phase 1 (100-75% health) fires 5-bullet circle patterns every 1 second, phase 2 (75-50%) fires spiral + aimed hybrid, phase 3 (50-25%) adds fast wave patterns, phase 4 (25-0%) combines all patterns with doubled speed
Implement object pooling that pre-allocates 1000 bullet nodes and reuses them via visibility toggling instead of instantiation/destruction
Create a power level system where player power goes from 0-100, increases on pickup, resets on death, and at 75+ power the player gets a pink aura particle effect and 50% faster fire rate
